query:
SELECT vp.id, pv.variantCode, vp.sellingPriceFobL1, vp.sellingPriceFobL2, vp.sellingPriceFobL3
FROM variant_pricing vp
JOIN product_variants pv ON vp.variantId = pv.id
WHERE pv.variantCode IN ('DC-001-B004', 'DC-001-B003', 'DC-001-B002', 'DC-001-B001')
ORDER BY pv.variantCode;

SELECT vp.id, pv.variantCode, vp.sellingPriceFobL1, vp.sellingPriceFobL2, vp.sellingPriceFobL3
FROM variant_pricing vp
JOIN product_variants pv ON vp.variantId = pv.id
WHERE pv.variantCode IN ('DC-001-B004', 'DC-001-B003', 'DC-001-B002', 'DC-001-B001')
ORDER BY pv.variantCode;
